# Frontend Prowess Standards
- Framework: Next.js 15 (App Router)
- Design Language: Ultra-Modern Glassmorphism.
- Aesthetics: High-end tech, frosted glass, backdrop-blur, thin borders (0.1 opacity).
- Fonts: Use "Geist" or "JetBrains Mono" for technical spec labels.
- Interactivity: Use Framer Motion for subtle, "weighted" animations.
- Rules: No bulky libraries. Keep CSS clean and use Tailwind utility classes.
